title: Pilot Protoplanetary Disk Catalog
text:
This project is an educational and computational pilot catalog of protoplanetary disks based on observational data.


HL Tau

title: HL Tau
text:
This is the first disk in the Pilot Protoplanetary Disk Catalog.



High-resolution image of the protoplanetary disk around HL Tau obtained with ALMA.



If you can see this page and the image, the catalog website is working correctly.
